name: codex-ultrawork
description: Inject the ultrawork orchestration directive when a user prompt contains `ultrawork` or `ulw`.

interface.longDescription: Codex Ultrawork is a `UserPromptSubmit` hook that detects the `ultrawork` or `ulw` keyword (word-bounded, case-insensitive) and injects a compact orchestration directive: bind a goal with explicit success criteria, open a durable /tmp notepad, register obsessive todos, run a scenario-driven execution loop with manual-QA evidence, and trigger a GPT-5.2 xhigh verification gate on rigorous/large/long-running work.
defaultPrompt: ultrawork: refactor this module end-to-end with QA evidence.
ulw: fix this bug, add scenarios, get GPT-5.2 xhigh approval.
